overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character walking through a moonlit historic stone corridor. The character progresses from an enclosed pathway with high walls to an open area with wooden fencing, approaching a large distant tree under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone corridor with high terraced walls

agents.ego_description: character in dark robes walking steadily along the stone pathway, holding a wand in the right hand

entered.detail: tiered stone seating or steps built into the left cliffside
tall dark stone wall running parallel to the path
large solitary tree visible in the distance against the night sky
cobblestone path extending forward between the stone structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed stone corridor at night. High stone walls flank both sides with tiered terraces on the left, creating a confined pathway leading toward a distant tree visible under the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone with lowering stone ruins

events.description: right side stone wall lowers from high barrier to ruined low wall, revealing more sky and opening the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the right-side enclosure opens up, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: lower stone wall ruins replacing the previous high wall structure

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the right-side wall lowers into ruins, opening up the previously enclosed corridor. The distant tree grows larger in the frame while the left terraces recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to ancient tree with wooden fencing

events.description: wooden fence appears on right side as path enters open rural area with grassy banks

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large tree structure in the distance along the increasingly open fenced path

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
grass-covered slope rising behind the wooden fence

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide rural area with wooden fencing on the right and grassy banks replacing the stone walls. The character approaches the large ancient tree that now dominates the center of the view, with the stone pathway continuing toward a wooden structure at its base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a confined stone corridor that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit rural landscape. It begins with the character walking through a narrow pathway flanked by high stone walls and tiered terraces, with a distant tree visible under a cloudy night sky. As the character progresses, the right-side wall lowers into ruins, expanding the view and allowing the distant tree to grow larger in the frame. The scene then opens further into a broad area where grassy banks and wooden fencing replace the stone walls. Finally, the camera approaches the large ancient tree that now dominates the center of the view, following the stone path toward a wooden structure at its base.
